queries.question: List singers and editors who received 2000.0.
queries.sql:
SELECT Stringers.name
FROM Stringers
WHERE Stringers.Payment = 2000.0
UNION
SELECT Editors.name
FROM Editors
WHERE Editors.Payment = 2000.0
